competitive_position: Bosch is running a structured 4-5 vendor tender with a July award imminent. No rival is named on any call or in Salesforce — a genuine knowledge gap. The clearest current alternative is the status quo of fragmented best-of-breed tools. Zycus's strongest differentiators are its organically-built agentic AI (Merlin) and single-ERP integration, both praised in the PoC; the priority is to extract the field from Thomas Kirmse and shape the RFP2 response to the scorecard before commercials.

champion.source: CRM MEDDPICC (13 May 2026); Avoma closing call 22 May 2026
champion.summary: Engagement is broad and operationally strong (Nordmann coordinated the POC, Elias delivered positive findings), but there is no confirmed champion with access to the economic buyer who is actively selling Zycus internally. Thomas Kirmse is the designated champion candidate and commercial contact yet is thinly present on calls. Champion strength is developing: deep operational advocacy exists, power-level advocacy does not.

items.area: Competitor identities in the 4-5 vendor longlist
items.quote: We are in a long-list of 4-5 suppliers.

items.area: Economic buyer engagement: Simon Vogelmann named in CRM but absent from all 28 calls
items.quote: John suggested to engage with c level once we are through the current stage of testing.
items.source: Salesforce Next Step (12 May 2026); CRM MEDDPICC (13 May 2026)

items.quote: Platform must support +50% user growth and +100% transaction growth.

recommended_moves: Deliver the overdue BYOK/SCIM written commitment AND the Swagger/Postman API docs, then build the RFP round 2 response around Bosch's own scorecard (functional depth, AI maturity, S/4HANA integration) — these are the exact gaps Bosch named at POC close and is scoring right now.

Set an executive connect between the deal owner's manager and Bosch's economic buyer (Simon Vogelmann, named in CRM but absent from all 28 calls), brokered through champion Thomas Kirmse rather than cold outreach.

Use the next Kirmse touch to extract the competitive field and shape the RFP2 emphasis: ask who else is shortlisted and which criteria carry most weight, then lean the response on the two praised differentiators (organic agentic AI/Merlin, proven live S/4HANA integration).

meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: The CRM MEDDPICC (13 May 2026) names Simon Vogelmann as economic buyer, which under the MEDDPICC-2.0 rule means the EB is identified rather than a blank gap; however, Simon Vogelmann does NOT appear on any of the 28 Avoma touchpoints, so his sponsorship is currently nominal, not active. The commercial thread is being carried by Thomas Kirmse (Category Purchasing Software & IT Services), who on the 22 May 2026 closing call signalled Bosch would 'step into further discussions in June' on commercials and contracts and is the named recipient of the partner list. The deal owner's manager flagged on 12 May 2026 (Next Step) that C-level engagement should happen once testing is through — testing closed 22 May, and that executive connect has not yet occurred. Converting the named EB into an engaged, present sponsor and getting budget allocation confirmed for the proposal is the single highest-leverage gap.
